briefing.title: 004 Structure Test Mission
briefing.text: Structure edge-height movement and LOS receipt map loaded through mission runtime.
objectives: Confirm walls block movement and LOS.
Confirm openings allow movement and LOS.

lines.name: Mission Control
lines.text: Structure edge-height test. Walls and doors should behave from map data, not map-name hardcoding.

lines.name: Mission Control
lines.text: Defeat. Structure mission result path resolved.
